where.if: AND ( AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.order_nm), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.order_phone), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.plan_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.sql: a.id ,a.company_id ,a.order_seq ,a.order_id_host ,a.order_dttm ,a.telecom_cd ,a.prod_dv ,a.plan_id ,a.plan_cd ,a.plan_nm ,a.settle_div ,a.entr_type ,a.customer_type ,a.charge_reduct_type ,a.new_phone_num1 ,a.new_phone_num2 ,a.pre_telecom_cd ,a.pre_mvno_cd ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.pre_phone_num), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') prePhoneNum ,a.num_mov_cert_method ,a.num_mov_cert_val ,a.usim_pay_type ,a.usim_model_nm ,a.usim_serial_num ,a.usim_type ,a.usim_buy ,a.esim_model ,a.esim_memory ,a.esim_number ,a.esim_imei1 ,a.esim_imei2 ,a.esim_eid ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.order_nm), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') orderNm ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.user_ssn), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') userSsn ,a.guard_nm ,a.guard_ssn ,a.guard_rel ,a.user_country ,a.identity_method ,a.identity_ci ,a.simple_cert_sp ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.order_phone), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') orderPhone ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.order_tel), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') orderTel ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.order_email), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') orderEmail ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.order_zip_cd), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') orderZipCd ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.order_addr), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') orderAddr ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.order_addr1), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') orderAddr1 ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.order_addr2), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') orderAddr2 ,a.advance_bank_cd ,a.advance_bank_acct ,a.advance_amt ,a.bill_cd ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.bill_zip_cd), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') billZipCd ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.bill_addr1), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') billAddr1 ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.bill_addr2), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') billAddr2 ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.bill_addr), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') billAddr ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.recv_nm), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') recvNm ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.recv_phone), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') recvPhone ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.recv_tel), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') recvTel ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.recv_zip_cd), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') recvZipCd ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.recv_addr), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') recvAddr ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.recv_addr1), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') recvAddr1 ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.recv_addr2), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') recvAddr2 ,a.tran_req_cont ,a.mobile_nm ,a.model_nm ,a.used_yn ,a.memory_size ,a.mobile_color_cd ,a.mobile_price ,a.mobile_suprt_price ,a.mobile_add_suprt_price ,a.instmnt_org_price ,a.mobile_suprt_chrg_fee ,a.instmnt_mm_cnt ,a.instmnt_chrg_price ,a.mobile_mm_pay_price ,a.contract_mm_cnt ,a.model_div ,a.basic_price ,a.event_disc_price ,a.after_price ,a.promotion_period ,a.contract_disc_price ,a.month_pay_price ,a.entr_price ,a.entr_price_disc ,a.usim_price ,a.usim_disc_price ,a.num_mov_fee ,a.settle_method ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.owner_nm), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') ownerNm ,a.bank_cd ,a.bank_acct_no ,a.card_cd ,a.card_num ,a.card_valid_dt ,a.gifts_nm ,a.order_state ,a.order_state_dttm ,a.order_state_sub ,a.cancel_request_state ,a.upd_id ,a.order_call_cont ,a.lock_app_cd ,a.dis_auth_join_div ,a.driver_number ,a.auth_org_dt ,a.driver_secure_num ,a.customer_ip ,a.agree_title ,a.agree_yn ,a.etc_req_cont ,a.guard_img1 ,a.guard_img2 ,a.tran_comp_cd ,a.tran_no ,a.tran_link_url ,a.entr_user_id ,a.point_plan_yn ,a.biz_plan_mngId ,a.recom_sp ,a.recom_user_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_ID(a.recom_user_id) AS recom_user_admin ,GET_WEB_USER_NM(a.recom_user_id) AS recom_user ,a.order_send_yn ,a.order_send_dttm ,a.create_date ,a.create_id ,a.modified_date ,a.modified_id ,b.username entrUserNm ,c.name AS companyNm ,a.open_comp_dttm ,a.account_num ,AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(a.open_tel_num), 'tb_pmb_plan_online_open') openTelNum ,GET_CODE_NAME('order_state',a.order_state) orderStateNm ,GET_CODE_NAME('pre_mvno_cd',a.pre_mvno_cd) preMvnoNm ,GET_CODE_NAME('bank_co_cd',a.bank_cd) bankNm ,GET_CODE_NAME('card_co_cd',a.card_cd) cardNm ,GET_ADMIN_USER_ID(a.recom_user_id) as recomUserAdminId ,GET_WEB_USER_ID(a.recom_user_id) as recomUserWEBId ,d.plan_name_smt_sub planNm2 ,b.kakao_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM tb_pmb_plan_online_open a LEFT join tb_mbm_user b ON a.create_id = b.id LEFT join tb_mbm_company_list c ON a.company_id = c.id LEFT join tb_pmb_plan_list d ON a.plan_id = d.id

SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_online_open a LEFT join tb_mbm_user b ON a.create_id = b.id LEFT join tb_mbm_company_list c ON a.company_id = c.id LEFT join tb_pmb_plan_list d ON a.plan_id = d.id WHERE a.id=#{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_online_open SET modified_id=#{modifiedId},
order_send_yn = #{orderSendYn},
order_send_dttm = #{orderSendDttm},
order_send_state = #{orderSendState},
order_state = #{orderState},
order_state_dttm = #{orderStateDttm},
tran_comp_cd = #{tranCompCd},
tran_no = #{tranNo},
tran_link_url = #{tranLinkUrl},
order_state_host = #{orderStateHost},
order_id_host = #{orderIdHost},
open_comp_dttm = #{openCompDttm},
account_num = #{accountNum},
open_tel_num = TO_BASE64(AES_ENCRYPT(#{openTelNum},'tb_pmb_plan_online_open')),
identity_ci = #{identityCi},
modified_date=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_online_open SET sale_status = 0 WHERE id=#{id}
